summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Garden After the Storm website focusing on the critical file upload freezing bug. Main bug has been FIXED - file uploads work without freezing the page.

critical_bugs.issue: Chat API returns 500 error with 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'startswith'
critical_bugs.impact: AI chat responses fail, but file upload and UI remain functional

minor_issues.issue: File access URL construction creates double '/api' in path
minor_issues.impact: Direct file access via URL may fail

integration_issues.issue: AI chat responses fail due to backend 500 error, but UI shows error gracefully

passed_tests: ✅ Website loads with all sections visible (hero, music, about, subscribe)
✅ Navigation links work correctly (MUSIC, ABOUT, SUBSCRIBE scroll to sections)
✅ Chat widget opens and displays properly
✅ Track list displays and is interactive (tracks clickable)
✅ CRITICAL: File upload in chat works without freezing page
✅ File upload shows preview and progress indicators
✅ Page remains responsive during file upload process
✅ Backend file upload API works with chunked processing
✅ Large file uploads (2MB) work without issues

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 features working - only AI chat responses affected by backend issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chat API 500 error - likely issue with LLM integration or environment variable handling in backend/server.py around line where 'NoneType' object is checked for 'startswith' method. The main file upload freezing bug has been successfully resolved.
